name: Replay transport rewinds and replays the loop history
description: The flight-recorder transport below the ring lets a user rewind the dashboard to an earlier iteration via the diamond markers and replay the history to the end with the play button; the ring, log, and stats all follow the selected position.

planSteps.description: Verify a replay transport bar appears between the ring-and-stats row and the ITERATION LOG, containing a play button, a horizontal rail with small diamond markers, and a readout of the form 'ITERATION k / N' where N equals the number of ITERATION LOG entries
Click the first (leftmost) diamond marker on the replay rail
Verify the readout now says ITERATION 1, the ITERATION LOG shows exactly one entry (#1), and the stats block's 'lessons learned' count decreased
Wait about six seconds for the replay to finish
Verify the readout has returned to its maximum position (ITERATION N / N with equal numbers), and the ITERATION LOG again lists all N entries
